questionHtml: Draw the Lewis (electron dot) structures of PF3 and PF5 and use the VSEPR theory to deduce the molecular geometry of each species including bond angles.
markschemeHtml:
Accept any combination of dots, crosses and lines.

Penalize missing lone pairs once only.

Do not apply ECF for molecular geometry.

Accept values in the range 95–109 for PF3.

meta.title: Draw the Lewis (electron dot) structures of PF3 and PF5 and use the VSEPR theory to deduce the molecular geometry of each species including bond angles.
breadcrumbLabels: 14.1 Covalent bonding and electron domain and molecular geometries
